title: clerodendrum cuspidatum
intro: Clerodendrum cuspidatum, also known as the 'Kalanodendron' or 'Tree Hydrangea', is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum cuspidatum include its potential to treat fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
